message:
feat(mermaid): add C4 layout+render for all 5 variants (bd-hudcn.1.14.2)

Add C4-specific layout and render support. The layout uses Sugiyama
with wider spacing (20x5 nodes) and cluster bounds for C4 boundaries.
The renderer draws bordered boxes with multi-line labels (kind, name,
technology) and cluster backgrounds for architectural boundaries.

- layout_c4_diagram(): Sugiyama layout with C4 spacing, cluster support,
  crossing minimization
- render_c4_entities(): bordered boxes + cluster backgrounds + edge rendering
- Dispatch wiring in render() and render_with_plan() via is_c4()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
